name: Dadi Education Holdings Limited
summary: Dadi Education Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides overseas studies consultancy services in Hong Kong. The company also provides education information technology services. It serves students seeking secondary and higher education studies in the United Kingdom, Australia, Canada, New Zealand, the United States, and internationally. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Mong Kok, Hong Kong. Dadi Education Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Grand Courage Investments Limited.
